entries.message: ✅ Spec / requirements or stated claim present — No committed spec file — judging against the PR description as the requirements/claim.
⚠️ Implementation plan artifact present — No implementation-plan artifact associated with this PR (none in its diff or description). Advisory only — adherence is not checked without one.

✅ Code adheres to the spec — The diff adheres to the provided spec: it adds URMA data-plane success-rate tracking, dynamic failover gflags, worker switching on persistent URMA failure with keep-current-worker semantics, and UT/ST coverage for the described scenarios.
⏭️ Code follows the implementation plan — No plan artifact associated with this PR; adherence not applicable.
✅ Docs updated alongside code — Docs updated alongside code (2 doc file(s)).
✅ Tests updated alongside code — Tests updated alongside code (4 test file(s)).
✅ Local review evidence present — Local review evidence found (PR review comments/approval).
